DISCOVERY 610, DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR ORDER COMPELLING COMPLIANCE WITH RECORDS SUBPOENA CONTINUED FROM OCT-17-2007 TO DISCOVERY AT OCT-31-2007, 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 610, FOR IN CAMARA REVIEW OF RECORDS. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

DISCOVERY 610, DEFENDANT ANAND JUDGE'S MOTION TO COMPEL COMPLIANCE WITH SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM. AFTER CONDUCTING AN IN CAMERA REVIEW OF THE RECORDS IDENTIFIED AS BRN 01 - BRN 46, THE COURT ORDERS THAT COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF PROVIDE THE HIGH-LIGHTED PORTIONS OF PAGES BRN-02 AND BRN-03 AND PAGES BRN-04 AND BRN-05 IN THEIR ENTIRETY. THE REMAINING PAGES NEED NOT BE PRODUCED AS DISCLOSURE WOULD VIOLATE PLAINTIFF'S RIGHT TO PRIVACY. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.
REMOVED FROM SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR SET FOR APR-17-2008 - CASE SETTLED. ASSIGNED TO DEPT. 212 ON JUL-15-2008 AT 10:00 AM FOR DISMISSAL PER CRC 3.1385.

Off Calendar Jul-15-2008 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Consolidated with Case No. 464452 Jackson vs. Judge. Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The court orders the balance of consolidated cases dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings reported by: Janet Pond, CSR#5292. (212)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Compliance With Records Subpoena
Off Calendar Oct-31-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCE:
Andrew P. Collier, Esq., for defendant and moving party: Anand Judge and Fox Rent A Car, Inc.
Stephen J. Purtill, Esq., for plaintiff and opposing party: Elizabeth Brown

HEARING HELD AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant Anand Judge's motion to compel compliance with subpoena duces tecum.
After conducting an in camera review of the records identified as BRN 01 - BRN 46, the Court orders that counsel for plaintiff provide the high-lighted portions of pages BRN-02 and BRN-03 and pages BRN-04 and BRN-05 in their entirety. The remaining pages need not be produced as disclosure would violate plaintiff's right to privacy. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Compliance With Records Subpoena
Off Calendar Oct-17-2007 Continued To Oct-31-07 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCE:
Mary B. O'Connor, Esq., for defendant and moving party: Anand Judge and Fox Rent a Car, Inc.
Andrew P. Collier, Esq., for plaintiff and opposing party: Elizabeth Brown

HEARING HELD AND Defendant Anand Judge's motion to compel compliance with subpoena duces tecum is continued to October 31, 2007 at 10:30 in Dept. 610, for in camara review of records. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-24-2007 Set For Trial On Nov-26-07 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Nov-07-07 At 02:30 P.M. In Dept 501
